CommandCenter.noDecisionItemsDesc: Open warnings from your workspace will appear here when the system finds something that needs attention.
CommandCenter.title: Dashboard
CommandCenter.subtitle: See what is happening, which issues need attention, how your brand appears in AI answers, and what your team should do next.
CommandCenter.emptyDesc: Connect the backend API and sign in with a real account to load workspace data.
CommandCenter.narrativeDesc: Latest findings from the backend will appear here after ingestion runs.
CommandCenter.narrativeRuleDesc: Findings, alerts, AI visibility, action plans, reports, and team feedback are loaded from your workspace data.
CommandCenter.alertDesc: Open early warnings from the backend will appear in the Early Warnings page.
CommandCenter.createActionFailed: Could not create an action plan. Please try again.
CommandCenter.geoCardTitle: Your brand is less visible in AI answers
CommandCenter.geoCardDesc: AI visibility results are loaded from live prompt test runs when available.
CommandCenter.recDesc: Action plans are generated from live alerts or narrative clusters in your workspace.

DataSources.title: Collect Data from Many Sources
DataSources.description: Add the sources you want to monitor, collect new data, and see which sources are feeding the system.
DataSources.connectedDesc: Collect data from these sources so AI can find useful insights.
DataSources.noSourcesDesc: Add a source or change the filter to start collecting data.

Signals.title: Signals Intelligence
Signals.subtitle: Triage raw signals and convert high-confidence analysis into action.
Signals.createActionFailed: Could not create an action plan. Please try again.
Signals.tableDesc: Monitor incoming signals, select a row to inspect context and recommendation.
Signals.loadingDetail: Loading signal detail and AI analysis...
Signals.noAnalysis: AI summary is not available yet. The raw scraped content is still shown in full below.

Visibility.title: AI Visibility
Visibility.subtitle: See how AI tools like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity mention your brand, which sources they use, and where competitors appear.
Visibility.createActionFailed: Could not create an action plan. Please try again.
Visibility.emptyDesc: We are collecting AI answer data to measure how often your brand appears. Please check again later.
Visibility.scoreDesc: A simple score based on how often your brand appears, source quality, competitor mentions, and tested questions.
Visibility.competitorDesc: Competitors appear more often in AI answers for crisis and monitoring questions.
Visibility.geoDesc: Suggested actions are based on weak answers and competitor-heavy results.
Visibility.footer: Note: AI visibility data, tested questions, citations, competitor tracking, and actions should all flow into the same action and reporting system.

ActionPlans.title: Action Plans
ActionPlans.subtitle: Turn analysis into clear next steps, such as PR response, content updates, or crisis handling.
ActionPlans.createActionFailed: Could not create an action plan. Please try again.
ActionPlans.emptyDesc: Action plans are created when a high-risk topic is found. Nothing needs action right now.
ActionPlans.feedbackDesc: Help the system improve by accepting, editing, or rejecting each suggestion.
ActionPlans.reason: Wrong tone, missing source, weak risk score, wrong action type...
ActionPlans.saved: Feedback is saved and used to improve future suggestions.
ActionPlans.footer: Note: each suggestion should include evidence, action type, reason, owner, approval status, and a measurable outcome.

Alerts.title: Early Warnings
Alerts.subtitle: Find issues before they grow, then record team decisions so future suggestions get better.
Alerts.createActionFailed: Could not create an action plan for this warning. Please try again.
Alerts.scoringDesc: Score changes after team feedback on suggestion quality, source fit, and usefulness.

flowSteps.recommendDesc: AI suggests an action based on data.
flowSteps.feedbackDesc: Accept, edit, or reject the suggestion.
flowSteps.betterDesc: The next suggestions become more useful.

Alerts.footer: Note: each warning should explain why it matters, such as speed, source strength, sentiment, topic spread, impact timing, and confidence. Feedback should use clear categories.

Intelligence.title: Topic Map
Intelligence.subtitle: Understand which topics are growing, who is involved, their impact, and the risks behind them.
Intelligence.createActionFailed: Could not create an action plan. Please try again.
Intelligence.mapDesc: 19 active topics from 428 findings across monitored sources
Intelligence.dominant: Main topic: accountability is becoming more important than technical reliability
Intelligence.dominantDesc: More people are connecting outage timing, leadership transparency, and customer trust. This topic may trigger alerts if more sources discuss it.
Intelligence.clusterTitle: Accountability topic is growing beyond outage complaints
Intelligence.clusterDesc: This topic connects customer trust, disclosure timing, and regulator attention. News citations are the strongest driver.
Intelligence.focusDesc: Prepare leadership response points and monitor regulator-related stakeholders.

Reports.title: Reports
Reports.description: Prepare clear report packages from findings, key issues, AI visibility, warnings, and action feedback.
Reports.emptyDesc: Reports will be prepared when enough data has been collected.
Reports.queueDesc: Track readiness, missing inputs, and export status for stakeholder reports.
Reports.noMatchDesc: Try another search term or status filter.
Reports.distributionDesc: Bundle the PDF, email summary, evidence notes, and owner notes in one place.
Reports.exportReadinessDesc: Report export now creates a backend export job, then checks whether the file is ready.
Reports.backendContractDesc: GET /api/reports, POST /api/reports/:id/export, and GET /api/reports/exports/:jobId are connected.

Sidebar.productionDesc: This build uses live backend APIs and shows empty states when data is unavailable.

AlertDetail.liveDetail: Live warning detail from the backend.
AlertDetail.notFoundDesc: This warning does not exist or your workspace cannot access it.
AlertDetail.createActionFailed: Could not create an action plan for this warning. Please try again.
AlertDetail.routeTo: Create an action plan with accept, edit, or reject feedback.

activity.title: Activity Timeline
activity.description: A simple timeline of recent system and team activity.
activity.emptyDesc: Live activity will appear after sources, warnings, action plans, or reports exist.

items.item1: AI created a response suggestion for Alert #204
items.item2: A new trust topic was found across Reddit and News
items.item3: AI visibility check found competitor-heavy answers
items.item4: The team accepted 8 new suggestion feedback items

cases.title: Cases
cases.description: Group warnings, actions, owners, and outcomes into one case.
cases.emptyDesc: Cases are built from live warnings and action plans in your workspace.

items.competitorTitle: Competitor appears more often in AI answers

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect the tools and sources that send data into Narriv.
integrations.emptyDesc: Production integrations will appear here after a backend workspace integrations endpoint is available.

items.benchmarksDesc: Questions used to test brand visibility in AI answers

settings.title: Workspace Settings
settings.description: Manage workspace configuration once the production settings API is available.
settings.emptyTitle: Workspace Settings API Not Connected Yet
settings.emptyDesc: Production workspace profile, team access, monitoring setup, and alert preferences should load from backend data here.
